summary: As falling fixed deposit rates push Indian savers toward corporate bonds and online debt platforms, many retail investors are underestimating the credit, liquidity and product risks behind high yields.

title: ITR filing AY 2026-27: You could legally reduce tax on half your earnings — Here’s who is eligible
summary: Section 44ADA simplifies tax filing for self-employed professionals by allowing them to treat half of their income as profit, reducing paperwork and taxable income. Eligible professionals include doctors, lawyers, and freelancers, who can file ITR-3 or ITR-4 under this scheme.

title: Why insurance industry needs a distribution revolution, not just a digital one
summary: India’s insurance industry has become faster and more digital, but low penetration shows trust—not access—remains the biggest challenge for meaningful financial protection.

title: EPFO 3.0: No paperwork, no waiting — instant EPF withdrawal via ATM and UPI; what actually changes for EPF users
summary: EPFO subscribers may soon withdraw funds directly to their bank accounts via UPI, eliminating employer sign-off and processing delays. Labor Minister Mansukh Mandaviya announced the initiative, which allows instant QR code transactions at ATMs, benefiting over seven crore members.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Railway union proposes 5-fitment-factor formula; salaries may jump over 400% — check calculator
summary: The IRTSA has proposed distinct fitment factors for various employee levels under the 8th Pay Commission, suggesting a range from 2.92 to 4.38. This could lead to significant salary increases, with some employees seeing hikes exceeding 400%.

title: Bank holiday today, May 27: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed for Bakrid/Eid al-Adha? – Check list
summary: Banks may be closed on May 27 or 28 for Bakrid/Eid al-Adha, depending on the state. Public holidays apply to central and most state government offices. Online banking and ATMs remain operational, allowing customers to perform transactions despite bank closures.

title: Atal Pension Yojana: Scheme, eligibility, pension payout, tax benefits of APY, explained
summary: The Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority's Atal Pension Yojana is a government initiative that seeks to create a universal social security system providing pension cover for the poor, underprivileged, and unorganised sector workers.

title: Zydus Lifesciences buyback alert! Last date to buy shares to participate in Rs 1,100 crore buyback at 7% premium
summary: Investors must purchase Zydus Lifesciences shares by Wednesday, May 27, to be eligible for the Rs 1,100 crore buyback, as the record date is May 29. The company approved buying back up to 95.65 lakh shares at Rs 1,150 each, a 7% premium. This follows strong Q4 results and a dividend recommendation.

title: Adani Power surpasses Infosys in market capitalisation after 126% rally in one year
summary: Adani Power has overtaken Infosys in market capitalisation to become India’s 11th most valued company. The stock has surged around 68% so far in 2026.

title: Coal India shares drop 6% after OFS launch. Buy the dip or wait? Here’s what technical indicators suggest
summary: Coal India shares fell over 6% after the government announced a Rs 5,000 crore offer for sale at a 10% discount to the previous closing price. Analysts said the stock’s near-term trend has turned cautious, with key support levels around Rs 428–430 and resistance seen near Rs 455–460.
